positive: A central, stylized geometric arrangement featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora and crystalline lunar elements. The design should evoke a sense of peaceful, ethereal wonder and scientific mystery. Use deep indigo blues, vibrant cyan aquamarines, and contrasting metallic gold accents for the glowing points. The composition should be highly symmetrical and framed within a clean, repeating pattern suitable for fabric printing. The style must be a blend of Art Nouveau organic flow with modern abstract geodesic structuring. Emphasize clear outlines, strong negative space, and high visual contrast, giving the appearance of being stamped onto a dark background. Minimalist yet maximalist in detail.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, messy lines, photographic, photorealism
